description_long: This is a small, lifelike bird with a plump, rounded body and a short, upright stance. Its plumage features a vibrant orange-red face and breast, blending into a white belly and flanks, while the wings, back, and tail are a rich brown with subtle feather detailing. The bird has a short, straight, conical beak and dark, alert eyes. Its legs are thin and brown, ending in three forward-pointing toes and one backward-pointing toe, suitable for perching. The tail is medium-length and slightly rounded, with a gentle upward tilt. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a European Robin, commonly seen in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, plump bird with an orange-red breast, brown wings and tail, and a short conical beak, resembling a European Robin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange-red face and breast, with both legs and feet visible beneath the rounded body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the brown wings, orange breast, and the bird's upright posture with the tail extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown back and tail feathers, with the head and body appearing symmetrical.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the orange breast, brown wings, and the bird's alert stance.
attribute_plumage_pattern: orange-red face and breast, white belly, brown wings and back, subtle feather gradients
